title: Validate Before Commit: reproducibility artifact (code and protocols)
description: Code, protocols and reproducibility guide for the paper 'Candidate Comparability Before Promotion: Conditional Validation in Adaptive Network Intrusion Detection' (framework and gate family: Validate Before Commit). The artifact contains: the progressive-drift readaptation experiment runner for adaptive network intrusion detection (drift monitors, candidate construction, the validate-before-commit gate, and downstream classifiers); the promotion-policy family, including the Validate-Before-Commit Sequential Gate (VBC-SG) with per-class empirical-Bernstein confidence sequences, a commit/reject/defer decision and a deployment-long risk budget; the preregistered symmetric-pipeline dynamic replication (self-contained incumbent/challenger pipelines, frozen vs. own-transformer policies, seeds 3001-3030); the preregistered size-matched self-contained challenger control (nested 512-in-2000 candidate batches, seeds 4001-4030, ATTENUATION under frozen construction/evidence/promotion rules); the registered protocols and pre-registrations; all analysis scripts that regenerate every table and figure; the sealed result manifests (MANIFEST.sha256 pinning every result CSV, and the machine-readable final manifest); and a claims audit that verifies every number in the manuscript against the generated artifacts. Datasets (CICIDS2017, UNSW-NB15, ToN-IoT) are public and not redistributed.
